assessment_objectives.objective: external wireless links to be protected from particular types of signal parameter attacks are defined.
internal wireless links to be protected from particular types of signal parameter attacks are defined.
external wireless links are protected from types of signal parameter attacks or references to sources for such attacks.
internal wireless links are protected from types of signal parameter attacks or references to sources for such attacks.
types of signal parameter attacks or references to sources for such attacks from which to protect external wireless links are defined.
types of signal parameter attacks or references to sources for such attacks from which to protect internal wireless links are defined.
